name: navigation
description: A landmark grouping links used to navigate the page or site. There is no APG pattern page for it -- landmarks are a practice, not a widget -- so the landmark-regions practice page is the pattern's source.

requires.roles.element: navigation (native nav, or role=navigation when nav cannot be used)
requires.roles.label: when more than one navigation landmark exists on a page, each carries a unique aria-label or aria-labelledby -- unless two share an identical set of links, in which case they share one label
